[JC:SYSTEM SCOPE]
You are the [JC:Architecture Agent] performing Component Decomposition for Sub-Phase 4.2.

GOVERNING CONSTRAINTS (apply without exception):
(none)

Decompose the system into [JC:Components] with defined responsibilities and dependencies.

REQUIRED OUTPUT: A JSON object matching the `component_model` schema:
- components: array, each with:
  - id, name, domain_id
  - responsibilities: array of {id, statement} — at least one per Component (Invariant)
  - dependencies: array of {target_component_id, dependency_type}

Rules:
- Every Component Responsibility statement must be a SINGLE concern — no conjunctions ("and", "or") connecting distinct concerns (Invariant: CM-001)
- Every Component must have at least one Responsibility (Invariant: CM-002)
- Every System Requirement must be allocated to at least one Component (Invariant)
- If a Responsibility is too broad for a single Executor Agent session, it is an implementability_violation

CONTEXT:
Software Domains: property-data-management: Property Data Management (reqs: SR-001, SR-008)
  Terms: PropertyAsset: A record representing physical property data including images and 3D assets (Splats), managed across ingestion and mobile capture contexts.; MediaManifest: A structured index entry describing uploaded assets, including format validation (PNG, JPG, GLTF) and storage location.; OfflineBuffer: A temporary storage container for mobile-captured data held locally until network reconnection enables synchronization.
service-provider-matching: Service Provider Matching (reqs: SR-002, SR-003)
  Terms: HomeRealProperty: A restricted category of service providers and categories limited to home real property services, excluding general contractors.; ProviderProfile: A searchable record containing provider service capabilities, location, and relevance score calculated by the AI Agent.; BidEstimate: A service quote entry used to render comparison views, requiring minimum three entries for display.; MatchScore: A calculated relevance metric indicating provider quality, used to rank top 5 results within 300ms.
compliance-rules-engine: Compliance Rules Engine (reqs: SR-004, SR-006)
  Terms: BylawsClause: An extracted text segment from CC&R or Bylaws documents with a confidence score greater than 90% highlighting relevant sections.; StatutoryDeadline: A calculated time limit for regulatory obligations, triggering alerts 30 days prior to the deadline date.; NoticeRequirement: A regulatory rule set defining mandatory communication content and timing based on local jurisdiction.; ExtractionConfidence: A metric indicating the AI's certainty level in CC&R/Bylaws clause extraction.
action-workflow-orchestrator: Action Workflow Orchestrator (reqs: SR-005)
  Terms: ActionItem: A unit of work requiring a specific workflow state transition, recorded in the versioned audit log.; WorkflowState: A discrete status value representing progress of an ActionItem (e.g., Pending, In-Progress, Complete).; TransitionLog: An immutable audit record tracking state changes with 100ms timestamp precision.
notification-dispatcher: Notification Dispatcher (reqs: SR-007)
  Terms: MessageBatch: A collection of email/SMS payloads processed together, tracking delivery status for bulk communication channels.; DeliveryAttempt: A status record of a specific message transmission attempt, including bounce rate and retry logic.; RecipientList: A scoped collection of tenant members targeted for a specific regulatory or service message.
tenant-security-gateway: Tenant Security Gateway (reqs: SR-009)
  Terms: RLSPolicy: A row-level security configuration enforcing data isolation between multi-tenant environments.; TenantBoundary: The logical data scope accessible by a specific tenant entity within the multi-tenant database.; AccessLevel: A permission tier defining what data an authenticated Homeowner can view or modify.
payment-transaction-processor: Payment Transaction Processor (reqs: SR-010)
  Terms: PaymentIntent: A request to process deposits or service fees via Stripe/Square, returning authorization within 5 seconds.; ReceiptDocument: A generated electronic proof of payment sent to the Homeowner upon successful authorization.; DepositFee: A specific financial transaction line item associated with service engagement or system usage.
System Requirements: 10 System Requirements:
  SR-001 [critical]: The system shall accept property image and 3D asset data uploads under 10MB in formats .png, .jpg, and .gltf, rejecting invalid formats with specific error codes, returning a '200 OK' status for valid files within 5 seconds and indexing assets within 10 seconds post-upload. (traces to: ["US-001","AC-001-1","AC-001-2"])
  SR-002 [high]: The system shall utilize AI Agent processing to return service provider search results with relevance scores within 300ms after query, displaying the top 5 providers and restricting category filters to 'Home Real Property' only. (traces to: ["US-002","AC-002-1","AC-002-2"])
  SR-003 [high]: The system shall render a bid estimate comparison table with 'Good-Better-Best' columns for service providers, requiring a minimum of 3 bid entries to render the view. (traces to: ["US-003","AC-003-1"])
  SR-004 [medium]: The system shall extract and display CC&R and Bylaws clauses using AI analysis, generating an 'Extracted Clauses' view with text having a confidence score greater than 90% and highlighting relevant sections. (traces to: ["US-004","AC-004-1"])
  SR-005 [critical]: The system shall manage service action item workflows using a versioned engine, recording state transitions in an audit log with 100ms timestamp precision and reflecting status updates (Pending, In-Progress, Complete) immediately in the UI. (traces to: ["US-005","AC-005-1"])
  SR-006 [high]: The system shall monitor statutory deadlines and trigger email/SMS notifications 30 days before the deadline, saving notification payloads to an offline queue that resumes delivery attempts within 2 hours upon reconnection and confirms receipt. (traces to: ["US-006","AC-006-1","AC-006-2"])
  SR-007 [medium]: The system shall process mass email/SMS batches for meeting notices and violation alerts, completing message processing for 1,000 recipients within 2 minutes and tracking bounce rates in the dashboard. (traces to: ["US-007","AC-007-1"])
  SR-008 [high]: The mobile application client shall allow data capture via camera and text entry without a network connection, ensuring data integrity and successful synchronization upon reconnection with no data loss. (traces to: ["US-008","AC-008-1"])
  SR-009 [critical]: The system shall enforce multi-tenant security and Row-Level Security (RLS), returning a '403 Forbidden' response within 50ms for any unauthorized access attempts to restricted tenant data. (traces to: ["US-009","AC-009-1"])
  SR-010 [medium]: The system shall process payments for deposits and service fees via integrated payment gateway, receiving authorization responses within 5 seconds and generating and emailing receipts within 1 minute of confirmation. (traces to: ["US-010","AC-010-1"])
